ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot admiring a mantelpiece clock, perhaps in a museum or antique shop.  The sequence will start with the robot's arms at its sides, then move to a position where both hands are cupping the clock, then gently lowering the hands to the sides, and finally returning to a neutral position.  This will use a slow, deliberate pace to emphasize the appreciation of the clock. This animation will be done with the right arm only, because the left arm can remain in a relaxed position to emphasize the right arm's movement.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, admiring the clock
right arm reaches out, cupping the clock gently
hands lower the clock with care
arms return to rest at the sides
